TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Christopher_Allport, title = Christopher_Allport, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christopher_Allport} }

S.FORM: Christopher Allport kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 6, Christopher Allport, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) qyanux nya Alexander Wise Allport Jr htagan beh sa postung. aring 9 kawas hiya ga qyanux na mqwas ru myugi maki New Canaan, (sincyanan)kngnyatiloco. Allport maki Northwestern University hopa pqwasan biru ru Paul Sills msqun mtzywaw. Susan Hayden sliqun squilq Allport.maki sazing mlikuy laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Christopher Allport kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 6, Christopher Allport, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) qyanux nya Alexander Wise Allport Jr htagan beh sa postung. aring 9 kawas hiya ga qyanux na mqwas ru myugi maki New Canaan, (sincyanan)kngnyatiloco. Allport maki Northwestern University hopa pqwasan biru ru Paul Sills msqun mtzywaw. Susan Hayden sliqun squilq Allport.maki sazing mlikuy laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtopħer allport kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtopħer allport, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qjanux nja alexan*er wis~ɕe allport *r ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa pos~ɕtuŋ. ariŋ * kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa qjanux na mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi maki new ʦ~ʨanaan, (s~ɕinʦ~ʨjanan)kŋnjatiloʦ~ʨo. allport maki nortħwes~ɕtern uni*ers~ɕitj ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ru paul s~ɕills~ɕ ms~ɕqun mtzjwaw. s~ɕus~ɕan ħaj*en s~ɕliqun s~ɕquilq allport.maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
